nasb.text: Behold, Assyria was a cedar in Lebanon With beautiful branches and forest shade, And very high, And its top was among the clouds.

esv.text: Behold, Assyria was a cedar in Lebanon, with beautiful branches and forest shade, and of towering height, its top among the clouds.

cnv.text: 看哪！亞述曾是黎巴嫩的香柏樹， 枝條秀美，林影茂密， 樹身高大， 樹頂在茂密的枝葉之上。

ccb.text: 看啊，亚述曾是黎巴嫩的一棵香柏树， 枝繁叶茂，遮天蔽日， 高耸入云。
